title: This Is Cinerama
director: Merian C. Cooper, Gunther von Fritsch, Ernest B. Schoedsack
actors: Lowell Thomas, Kathy Darlyn, Toni Valk
plot: On the evening of September 30, 1952, the shape and sound of movies changed forever with the introduction of Cinerama.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
